title: CW10 0QF, BIP Environmental Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/RP3531LP/V012
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: BIP Environmental Ltd   Installation name: BIP Environmental   Permit number: EPR/RP3531LP/V012   "
